<table>
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th rowspan="2" scope="col">Region</th>
      <th colspan="2" scope="colgroup">Q1</th>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <th scope="col">Revenue</th>
      <th scope="col">Cost</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <th scope="rowgroup" rowspan="2">North</th>
      <td>100</td>
      <td>60</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>110</td>
      <td>62</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <th scope="row">South</th>
      <td>90</td>
      <td>55</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
